text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: My favorite kind of firework, you ask?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Well, let's see. I think I would say sparklers. 
Like fleeting and falling buds, peonies 
and pine needles… They remind me of 
the transience of all things.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
You know I love those classic shells! 
Nothing gets you pumped better than 
the bing bang boom!!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Thankies, both of you! This gives me 
a lot to think about.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Since I'm handling some prep for the next 
dorm fireworks festival, I've gotta figure out 
what to stock up on!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
If I recall, Pearl, you had mentioned 
that you liked rockets?

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Oh my, great memory, Grass! You got 
that right. Rockets are just excellent!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
A trail of light stretching straight into 
the great beyond! A grace that compels 
everyone to look up…

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's just wonderful!! I wanna turn heads 
just like that!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Pearl…! I bet they'll be calling you 
rocket lady in no time!!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
A rocket that will never burn out, to be seen 
across the night sky in each and every world.
